name: claude-code-superuser-pack
description: Personal command center with 89 skills, 11 agents, 6 domain workspaces, and Obsidian vault for Claude Code
author: Sean Winslow

01-core-features.description: CLI, hooks, subagents, MCP, settings, skill system

02-pm-workflows.description: PRDs, tickets, stakeholder updates, data analysis

03-creative-projects.description: Phaser 3, sprites, pixel art, AI creative tools

04-advanced-techniques.description: Multi-instance, context management, Plan Mode, security

05-life-optimization.description: Finance, tasks, learning, health, time management

06-obsidian-integration.description: Vault architecture, MCP setup, semantic search

07-technical-stack.description: React, Python, Supabase, Git, Docker, Cursor

08-domain-specific.description: Crypto, education, API PM, RevOps, AI-native

11-remotion-mastery.description: Video creation, typography, data viz, transitions

plugin.description: Safe, universal components for Claude Code plugin distribution
